measurements.Coh: universal dependency sink, no outgoing edges

concepts_processed.notes: 0 outgoing edges, 7 incoming defined_using. Pure atomic type. 3 lines max.
0 outgoing, 3 incoming. Even simpler than domain. Combine with domain.
Only relevant to Ch3 automata. Define here, point there.
Just c* in C. Two lines.
Single hypothesis h. Merge with hypothesis_space discussion.
Solomonoff prior. Brief because Ch11 will cover Kolmogorov properly.

concepts_processed.centerpiece: the c: X -> {0,1} vs c subset X duality
concepts_processed.notes: The function-vs-set duality is worth stating once clearly. Gateway to concept_class.

measurements.Coh: MASSIVE - 21 incoming edges, all complexity measures target it

concepts_processed.notes: This is the HUB NODE. 21 incoming edges including ALL complexity measures. Framework Bridge profile - show how this one object is seen differently by every paradigm. This is where the reader first sees why the graph matters.

concepts_processed.centerpiece: proper vs improper and why it matters
concepts_processed.notes: The proper/improper distinction has computational consequences (proper_improper_separation). Set up the tension here.

concepts_processed.centerpiece: NFL theorem makes this NECESSARY not optional

measurements.Coh: touches NFL, SRM, Bayesian, computational_hardness - FOUR paradigms

concepts_processed.notes: NEGATIVE RESULT drives this concept. Without NFL, inductive bias is just a design choice. With NFL, its a mathematical necessity. The negativity is the content. Profile D - witness centered around NFL.

concepts_processed.centerpiece: version space COLLAPSES for many natural problems
concepts_processed.notes: Interesting because version space elimination is the simplest consistent learner but has exponential worst case. The gap between the simple idea and the computational reality is the content.

concepts_processed.centerpiece: analogy to inductive_bias - the obstruction is type_mismatch

measurements.Coh: analogy edges to mml and inductive_bias, required by posterior_consistency
measurements.Comp: complete as definition, incomplete as learning framework

concepts_processed.notes: Has ANALOGY edge to inductive_bias with type_mismatch obstruction. The prior IS an inductive bias, but they live in different type systems. This type mismatch is more interesting than the definition of Bayes rule.

concepts_processed.centerpiece: three-way analogy network: MDL-MML-Occam, all similar but not equivalent

measurements.Coh: analogy to kolmogorov, mml, and occam_algorithm

concepts_processed.notes: MDL sits in a triangular analogy network with MML and Occam. None of them are the same thing. The fact that they LOOK the same but ARENT is the content. Obstruction analysis.
Cover TOGETHER with MDL. The joint treatment reveals the analogy network.

concepts_processed.centerpiece: explicit construction of inductive bias using VC theory
concepts_processed.notes: SRM is the operational answer to how to build inductive bias. Brief but concrete.

session_gamma: Discovery: Ch1 has 7 pure vocabulary items (3 lines each) and 9 concepts with real content. The real structure is: (a) concept_class as hub node seen by all paradigms, (b) inductive_bias driven by the NFL negative result, (c) MDL/MML/Bayesian as an analogy triangle of near-misses. The chapter is NOT about definitions - its about showing that even the base types have structure when viewed through the graph.
session_eta: High - discovered 3 distinct structural themes in what looks like vocabulary definitions
notes: Initialized with Cuzzolin geometric belief framework for Pl measurement and URT R2 Chapter 8 for measurement initialization. Pl = mass assignment concentration (singleton vs large focal sets). Coh = edge-type diversity on node. Inv = restricts vs extends_grammar sensitivity. Comp = open_problems / resolved ratio.
